authorization_phrase_detected: YES start P187 production DB migration dry-run checklist only

p185_rehearsal_summary.destructive_exact_phrase_required: YES execute P188 production DB migration from main 54462 to reconciled 94924 using P185 rehearsal SQL, approve MAX(id) dedup dropping 160 null-provenance duplicate rows, create timestamped backup, no controlled_apply
p185_rehearsal_summary.note: This destructive phrase is listed as a NEXT OPTION only. It is NOT authorized in P187.

dry_run_checklist.description: 13-item checklist operator must complete IN ORDER before any production DB write. Each item is a STOP gate — if any item fails, migration does not proceed.

DRC-02_clean_tree.name: Clean working tree check
commands: git diff --cached --name-only  # must be empty (nothing staged)
# Tolerated: pre-existing dirty DB/pid/monitor files (not staged)
DRC-02_clean_tree.stop_if: Any staged file — do not proceed

DRC-03_db_precheck.name: Production DB row/schema precheck
commands: sqlite3 lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays;"  # expect 54462
sqlite3 lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db "PRAGMA table_info(strategy_prediction_replays);" | grep bet_index  # expect: no output (ABSENT)

DRC-04_zen_gates_source.name: Zen-gates source DB verification
DRC-04_zen_gates_source.stop_if: Worktree absent, wrong branch, or row count != 94924

DRC-06_exact_phrase.name: Exact destructive authorization phrase verification
DRC-06_exact_phrase.required_phrase: YES execute P188 production DB migration from main 54462 to reconciled 94924 using P185 rehearsal SQL, approve MAX(id) dedup dropping 160 null-provenance duplicate rows, create timestamped backup, no controlled_apply
DRC-06_exact_phrase.check: The exact phrase must appear verbatim in the P188 prompt. Operator must compare character-by-character.
DRC-06_exact_phrase.stop_if: Phrase absent or any character differs

DRC-07_sql_review.name: SQL script human review
review_items: Table recreation DDL matches zen-gates CREATE TABLE semantics
INSERT SELECT uses MAX(id) per (lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id)
bet_index INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 in new table definition
INSERT from zen-gates uses WHERE bet_index > 1 filter
No extra rows or columns injected
Transaction boundaries wrap all DDL and DML
DRC-07_sql_review.stop_if: Any review item fails human inspection

DRC-08_dedup_approval.name: MAX(id) dedup policy human confirmation
DRC-08_dedup_approval.check: Operator must confirm: exactly 160 rows will be permanently dropped. All 160 have NULL controlled_apply_id, NULL provenance_hash, NULL truth_level. This is irreversible without backup restore.
DRC-08_dedup_approval.verification_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM strategy_prediction_replays GROUP BY lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id);  -- expect 160

DRC-09_import_approval.name: 40622-row import approval confirmation
DRC-09_import_approval.check: Operator must confirm: 40622 rows with bet_index > 1 will be inserted from zen-gates source. Verify zen-gates source count matches.
DRC-09_import_approval.verification_query: sqlite3 <zen-gates-db> "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE bet_index > 1;"  -- expect 40622

DRC-10_stop_api_writers.name: Production lock — stop all API writers
commands: cat backend.pid 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -0 2>/dev/null && echo 'BACKEND_RUNNING_STOP_IT' || echo 'BACKEND_STOPPED'
cat frontend.pid 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -0 2>/dev/null && echo 'FRONTEND_RUNNING_STOP_IT' || echo 'FRONTEND_STOPPED'

DRC-11_create_backup.name: Create timestamped immutable backup
commands: sqlite3 ${BACKUP} "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM strategy_prediction_replays;"  # must equal 54462
DRC-11_create_backup.stop_if: Backup row count != 54462 OR chmod fails OR file not read-only

DRC-12_drift_guard_pre.name: Pre-migration drift guard PASS at 54462
commands: uv run python scripts/replay_lifecycle_drift_guard.py  # expect REPLAY_LIFECYCLE_DRIFT_GUARD_PASS

DRC-13_go_no_go.name: Final go/no-go gate
checklist: SQL script reviewed and approved by operator
Operator is ready to monitor migration to completion
DRC-13_go_no_go.decision: If ALL items confirmed: proceed with migration SQL. If ANY item unconfirmed: STOP — do not execute migration.

items.check: CREATE TABLE strategy_prediction_replays_new present with all required columns
INSERT uses WHERE id IN (SELECT MAX(id) ... GROUP BY lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id)
bet_index INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 present in CREATE TABLE
INSERT from zen-gates uses WHERE bet_index > 1
ATTACH uses file:...?mode=ro for zen-gates DB
SELECT COUNT(*) after each major step — 54302 after dedup, 94924 after import
SELECT COUNT(*) for duplicates under new UNIQUE constraint — expect 0
DROP TABLE / ALTER TABLE RENAME present in correct order
Migration wraps DDL/DML in implicit or explicit transaction; any error triggers rollback

backup.verify_bet_index_absent: sqlite3 <backup> "PRAGMA table_info(strategy_prediction_replays);" | grep bet_index  -- expect no output

rollback_procedure: 4. sqlite3 lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db "PRAGMA table_info(strategy_prediction_replays);" | grep bet_index  -- verify ABSENT
5. uv run python scripts/replay_lifecycle_drift_guard.py  -- verify PASS at 54462

go_no_go_gate.decision: GO only if all conditions confirmed. NO-GO on any single failure.
